creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
MASTER_SITE is outdated

How-To-Repeat: --- Makefile.orig       Wed Nov  1 00:57:48 2000
+++ Makefile    Wed Nov  1 00:58:25 2000
@@ -8,9 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      upsd
 PORTVERSION=   2.0.1.6
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://www.ww.net/pub/wildwind/upsd/ \
-               http://www.cre8tivegroup.com/ \
-               ftp://ftp.sw.ru/pub/unix/upsd/
+MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.rge.com/pub/admin/upsd

 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
